---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OmniPlayr
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Feel free to include examples, mockups, or pseudocode.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? If so, describe them here.

## Plugin / Component
If this request is related to a specific part of OmniPlayr, please indicate which one:

- [ ] Plugin system / architecture
- [ ] Specific plugin (please specify): ___
- [ ] Playback / player interface
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] Docker / self-hosting / setup
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any other context, links, or references that might help understand the request.
